name: The Back Nine Golf | Pittsburgh, PA - West Hills
about: The Back Nine Golf in Pittsburgh, PA offers a golf simulation experience with a focus on accessibility and convenience. Located in West Hills, this venue provides a modern space for golfers to practice and play. While specific details about technology and amenities are currently unavailable, the venue appears designed for casual play and social gatherings. Pricing and operational details are accessible through their official website for those interested in booking sessions.
why_golfers_like_it: Potential for food and drink options

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are available on-site, though bringing your own clubs is typically permitted.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink may not be permitted as the venue offers on-site kitchen and bar services.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round typically take?
faq.answer: An 18-hole simulation session generally takes 1-2 hours depending on group size and pace of play.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The Back Nine Golf welcomes families, though specific children's amenities or age restrictions aren't specified.
